hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("supabase/schemas/") then "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"⚠️ supabase/schemas/ was modified. Run: supabase db diff --local --schema public -f <migration_name> to generate the migration, then commit both the schema file and the generated migration.\"}}" else empty end'
